category_sources: source_facts.description says Brotli is a generic-purpose lossless compression algorithm by Google.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is brotli; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to google/brotli.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official Google Brotli repository; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/google/brotli; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies lossless compression; source_facts.executables and current_curation.tags indicate CLI usage.
